breaches.name: ExfilForumDB
breaches.title: Exfil Underground Forum
breaches.description: Underground hacking forum database exposed by rival threat actor. Contains member profiles, private messages, and credential data for 284k registered users.

breaches.name: DarkLeaks2024
breaches.title: DarkLeaks Compilation 2024
breaches.description: Compilation of credentials aggregated from multiple prior breaches, distributed on darknet forums.

breaches.name: RansomGroupLeak
breaches.title: RansomGroup Member List
breaches.description: Internal member registry of a ransomware syndicate, leaked by law enforcement following infrastructure takedown.

breaches.name: SteamDB2023
breaches.title: Steam Community Database 2023
breaches.description: Gaming platform credential database exposed via SQL injection vulnerability.
